description: Crafted from 92% cotton and 8% spandex fabric, this high coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with an under-wired moulded style. The double layered cups come in soft feminine shades embellished with an embroidered butterfly. The contrast dé colleté elastic and straps adds to the modern look while a shape that offers exemplary comfort makes it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for support through the day. Made of breathable stretch cotton/spandex fabric for enhanced comfort Double layered cups with an under-wired moulded style with contrast dé colleté elastic and an embroidered butterfly for perfect shaping and style Beautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretch Printed label for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Hand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or iron Drip dry in shade Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
